dct_description_sm: New York City School Demographics, 2006-2007 is a point theme representing schools in New York City in the 2006-2007 school year. Attribute information includes data from the NYC Department of Education demographic snapshot released in response to Local Law. 59 passed in 2016. These demographic snapshots include information on enrollment by grade, sex, race and language. A codebook is included in the full download package. Columbia library staff accessed this data in April of 2026 from the NYC Open Data portal at https://data.cityofnewyork.us/Education/2006-2012-School-Demographics-and-Accountability-S/ihfw-zy9j/about_data extracted the data for the year and appended the school locations data at https://data.cityofnewyork.us/Education/School-Point-Locations/jfju-ynrr/about_data. Other locations may have been identified from other DOE online resources or based off of NYC Planning LION based geocoding services. Columbia Libraries offers no assurance to the accuracy of the location data. The file is provided it in the geopackage format in State Plane Long Island Coordinates.
